name: Pup Cid's Little Quiz Show Plugin
description: Interactive quiz show plugin for TikTok livestreams with chat integration, category voting, duel mode, achievements, seasons, jokers, and leaderboard
author: TikTok Helper
features: Question database management with upload, manual creation, cooldowns, and packages
Show playlists with audience category voting
Interactive quiz rounds with countdown timer
Duel mode for two users or teams
TikTok chat integration for answers and votes
Configurable overlay themes, accessibility, and avatar performance
Sound upload and event sound management
Import and export for questions and leaderboard

descriptions.en: Interactive quiz show plugin for TikTok livestreams with category voting, duel mode, achievements, seasons, chat integration, jokers, and high-end overlays.
descriptions.de: Interaktives Quiz-Show-Plugin fuer TikTok-Livestreams mit Kategorie-Voting, Duel-Modus, Achievements, Seasons, Chat-Integration, Jokern und hochwertigen Overlays.
descriptions.es: Plugin de concurso interactivo para directos de TikTok con votacion de categorias, modo duelo, logros, temporadas, chat, comodines y overlays.
descriptions.fr: Plugin de quiz interactif pour livestreams TikTok avec vote de categories, mode duel, succes, saisons, chat, jokers et overlays.
